Campus Cornerstones

A mapped history of Iowa State University

Word Clouds

Browse Locations

Use this word cloud visualization to browse locations. Word size is determined by frequency and all words link to a corresponding collection search.

Browse Architects

Use this word cloud visualization to browse architects of the buildings on ISU campus. Word size is determined by frequency and all words link to a corresponding collection search.

Campus Cornerstones

Initiated in 2024 and currently a work in progress, this site explores the history of the buildings of Iowa State University through historical photographs, maps, and modern GIS data.
